defaultPolicy: auto-detect hardware and choose the strongest local tier that can run reliably

profiles.label: Apple Silicon Pro/Max
profiles.textModelTier: quantized 14B-32B reasoning/copy models where memory allows
profiles.imageModelTier: ComfyUI with Qwen-Image or lighter fallback depending on RAM
profiles.notes: First-class target for MacBook Pro M3 Pro class machines.

profiles.label: NVIDIA GPU 16GB+ VRAM
profiles.textModelTier: larger dense or MoE local models depending on VRAM
profiles.notes: Best target for concurrent agents and image generation.

profiles.label: NVIDIA GPU 8GB-12GB VRAM
profiles.imageModelTier: SDXL/Qwen/FLUX fallback workflows after license and memory checks

profiles.label: CPU or weak GPU
profiles.textModelTier: small local instruct models with slower batch workflows
profiles.imageModelTier: manual visual briefs or external optional local machine
profiles.notes: Still no required paid APIs, but output quality/speed is limited.
